description: Letter from Avraham b. Abi al-Hayy, from Alexandria, to his brother Musa. Around 1075. The writer describes his difficulties, especially financially, as he depends on the wheat and money that Musa sends him. Their sister, Garba, needs help as well to have the products she needs for weaving. Avraham is a teacher for young children and the payments are small and not constant, and he is missing several books. (Information from Gil, Kingdom, Vol. 3, #472) VMR
